rulings.Case Title: GEARY-NINTH DE, LLC VS. CHARLES SUN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 12, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF GEARY-NINTH DE, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Due to COVID-19 pandemic telephonic appearances are encouraged. If you personally appear for your case notify the department by 5:00 p.m. one day before the hearing at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org. Department will follow social distancing guidelines and you will be required to wear a mask or face covering. By 8:00 a.m. on the date of the hearing parties to submit electronic copies of their respective proposed orders (prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with the tentative ruling in additions to any other proposed orders) in an editable format to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org, so that the judge can modify it prior to signing, if needed. All communications shall include in the subject line the case name, number and hearing date. (e.g. "Smith v. Jones; CGC-18-555555; June 1, 2020") Plaintiff's Motion for Entry of Judgment. Hearing Required. All declarants to be present. The hearing will take place in department 303 (CourtCall appearances, if any, to be arranged for that department). = (501/CFH)
